message.content:
@startuml
participant "Program" as P
participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as BridgeCX3
participant "Camera OV5640" as Camera

section Initialization
    P --> V4L2 : OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
    V4L2 --> Camera : 2
    Camera --> V4L2 : 4
    V4L2 --> P : 6
    P --> V4L2 : 7 InitDevice()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 8
    Camera --> V4L2 : 9
    V4L2 --> Camera : 10
    Camera --> P : 12
endsection

section Test
    P --> V4L2 : 13 SetParameter(valueA)
    V4L2 --> Camera : 14 valueA
    Camera --> V4L2 : 16
    V4L2 --> P : 18
    P --> V4L2 : 19 GetParameter()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 20
    Camera --> V4L2 : 22 value
    V4L2 --> P : 24 value
    P --> V4L2 : 25 StartStream()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 26
    Camera --> V4L2 : 28
    V4L2 --> P : 30
    P --> V4L2 : 31 GetParameter()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 32
    Camera --> V4L2 : 34 value
    V4L2 --> P : 36 value
    P --> V4L2 : 37 SetParameter(valueB)
    V4L2 --> Camera : 38 valueB
    Camera --> V4L2 : 40
    V4L2 --> P : 42
    P --> V4L2 : 43 GetParameter()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 44
    Camera --> V4L2 : 46 value
    V4L2 --> P : 48 value
    P --> V4L2 : 49 StopStream()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 50
    Camera --> V4L2 : 52
    V4L2 --> P : 54
    P --> V4L2 : 55 GetParameter()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 56
    Camera --> V4L2 : 58 value
    V4L2 --> P : 60 value
endsection

section Destruction
    P --> V4L2 : 61 CloseDevice()
    V4L2 --> Camera : 62
    Camera --> V4L2 : 63
    V4L2 --> Camera : 64
    V4L2 --> P : 66
    Camera --> P : 65
    V4L2 --> P : 66
endsection

@enduml
